title: Summoning
overview: When the Kingdom's mages summon not one, but two Saints, and the first is whisked off towards grandeur and glory, the second, older woman, Sei, must make a new life in a fantasy realm.

title: Companionship
overview: Sei revolutionizes Salutania's culinary arts. A handome high-ranking man expresses his heartfelt thanks to Sei for saving his life. Sei makes a new friend and finds a new passion for cosmetics.

title: Capital
overview: The Knight Commander takes Sei out on a shopping trip to the Kingdom's capital. Sei learns a new craft from a powerful mage.

title: Miracle
overview: After learning about her summoned counterpart's struggles, Sei is forced to come to an uncomfortable conclusion. Soon after, Sei's foray into healing magic changes her world forever.

title: Appraisal
overview: Unable to keep her mysterious powers under wraps, Sei meets with the Grand Magus to determine if she is the Saint. The King of Salutania calls Sei to court.

title: Lady
overview: Sei begins her magic training in earnest, tutored by none other than the Grand Magus himself. Commander Hawke and Liz assist Sei with learning the how to be ladylike.

title: Interlude
overview: When the Kingdom's mages summon a Saint, Aira is whisked off towards grandeur and glory. Now ward to the Crown Prince and unable to return home, Aira must make a new life in a fantasy realm.

title: Awakening
overview: Sei discovers a powerful new aspect of her Saintly nature. When she joins the Knights for a dangerous expedition, Sei must use all she's learned to keep her friends safe.

title: Saint
overview: Still unable to replicate her lifesaving conjury, Sei continues her training--then stumbles into an argument between Liz and Prince Kyle about her Sainthood. Aira makes a new friend.

title: Diary
overview: Sei travels to Klausner's Domain. When she's introduced to a masterful alchemist, Sei learns new things about potion-making--and her own powers.

title: Predicament
overview: Sei struggles to come to terms with the conditions for casting the Saint's conjury. The party of Knights, mercenaries, and mages sets off into the treacherous woods.

title: Return
overview: When the fighting in Klausner's Woods grows fraught, it's up to Sei and her Saintly conjury to cleanse the forest and restore it to its former glory.

title: The Trading Company
overview: Sei greets her second summer in this world. Now that the miasma is under control and she has a bit of free time to do a little exploring...

title: A Foreign Country
overview: After discovering coffee, Sei decides to go to Morgenhaffen, a port city in Salutania, in her search for items or ingredients from Japan.

title: The Ceremony
overview: Sei is invited to the royal palace for the Holy Saint's official debut. On top of that, it seems like she must also attend the royal ball.

title: The Imperial Prince
overview: The royal palace summons Sei once again. It seems they are getting a foreign exchange student, an imperial prince from Zaidera...

title: Purpose
overview: Sei remains wary around the imperial prince, but after learning a bit more of his situation, she grows curious about what he's really doing in the country.

title: Divine Blessing
overview: Now that Sei knows Prince Ten'yuu needs her help, she tries to think of a way to create a panacea without exposing her powers as the Holy Saint.

title: Interlude
overview: Now that things have settled down, a new problem is arising. It seems that everyone is trying to get the Holy Saint to marry into their family...

title: Frontier
overview: Sei goes to the farthest end of the kingdom, the Hawke Region, for what the royal palace believes to be her final expedition as the Holy Saint.

title: Final Act
overview: To combat the source of the miasma and the unusual monsters in the area, Sei and her faithful guard venture into the local mine, where a frightful danger awaits them...

title: Longing
overview: It seems that Sei's duties as a Holy Saint are coming to an end with the purification of the last miasma swamp. Now Sei must start thinking about her future.

title: Blessing
overview: Rumors are swirling about Sei and her theater date, which has her feeling self-conscious with everyone. Can she acknowledge her own...
